chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-4077 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING OF CASE. 1. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 28.08.2025 None present for the Petitioner. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Abdul Samad Khan, Advocate for NADRA. --------------------- None is present on behalf of the Petitioner, nor has any intimation been received. The petition is liable to be dismissed for non- prosecution. On 29.05.2025, the following order was passed: “No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. By way of an indulgence, the matter is being adjourned today with a note of caution that if representation on behalf of the Petitioner is found wanting on the next date, the Petition would be liable for dismissal.” Today again, none has appeared on behalf of the Petitioner. It reflects that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the instant Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
